title: Lesson 1106: 染める, 逸らす, 反り...

items.gloss: to dye; to colour; to color

to turn away (one's eyes, face, etc.); to avert; to divert (e.g. one's attention); to evade (e.g. a question); to change (e.g. the subject); to displease; to annoy; to offend; to upset; to miss (the target, ball, etc.)
turning over; flipping over; reply; response; marks written alongside characters in a classical Chinese text to indicate their ordering when read in Japanese; lapel
well then ...; in that situation; in which case
therefore; for that reason; so; because of that
